description_long: This kiosk is an open, pavilion-style structure set on a square patch of green grass with a large circular sand or gravel area in the center. The kiosk is defined by several white and decorated partition panels arranged in a partial enclosure, displaying colorful posters, maps, and informational graphics. A prominent 3D sign reading 'SARPARN' floats above the kiosk, serving as a clear identifier. The panels vary in design, with some featuring landscape images and others displaying text or illustrations, suggesting an informational or exhibition function. The structure is open on all sides, allowing easy access and visibility from multiple directions. There are no visible doors, windows, or a traditional roof, giving the kiosk a modern, minimalist, and temporary appearance suitable for parks or public events.
description: An open, pavilion-style kiosk with white and decorated display panels, a central sand area, and a floating 'SARPARN' sign above. The structure is modern, accessible from all sides, and designed for informational or exhibition use.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the kiosk from the front, highlighting the floating 'SARPARN' sign, the central sand area, and the main display panels with colorful graphics and maps.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a left-side perspective, revealing more of the decorated panels and the open, accessible layout of the kiosk.
description_view_2: View 2 shows the rear and right side, focusing on the back of the display panels and the open nature of the structure.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a right-front angle, displaying the arrangement of the panels and the central sand area, with the 'SARPARN' sign visible above.
attribute_signage_type: 3D printed sign, floating above the kiosk, with the text 'SARPARN' in large block letters.
attribute_roof_design: none; open-air with no visible roof structure.
